{"id":"project-LICHEN-ga4n","title":"Duplicate protobuf implementation with inconsistent error codes","description":"Files: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c and codec.c

Both files implement nearly identical protobuf helper functions with subtle differences:

1. pb_read_varint: adapter.c lacks NULL checks (lines 336-356), codec.c has them (lines 225-249)

2. pb_write_fixed32_field returns different error codes:
   - adapter.c line 458: returns -EMSGSIZE
   - codec.c line 382: returns -ENOMEM
   
3. pb_write_fixed32_field uses different write methods:
   - adapter.c uses sys_put_le32()
   - codec.c manually writes bytes

This code duplication creates maintenance burden and risks inconsistent behavior.

Fix: Extract common protobuf helpers into a shared internal header/implementation.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:08.339182Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:08.339221Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-ga4n","title":"Duplicate protobuf implementation with inconsistent error codes","description":"Files: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c and codec.c

Both files implement nearly identical protobuf helper functions with subtle differences:

1. pb_read_varint: adapter.c lacks NULL checks (lines 336-356), codec.c has them (lines 225-249)

2. pb_write_fixed32_field returns different error codes:
   - adapter.c line 458: returns -EMSGSIZE
   - codec.c line 382: returns -ENOMEM
   
3. pb_write_fixed32_field uses different write methods:
   - adapter.c uses sys_put_le32()
   - codec.c manually writes bytes

This code duplication creates maintenance burden and risks inconsistent behavior.

Fix: Extract common protobuf helpers into a shared internal header/implementation.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:08.339182Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:59:42.247958109Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T22:59:42.247958109Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:04:42.247958109Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T22:59:42.247958109Z"}
